# PERF-187 positive: template.HTMLEscaper in a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-187-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	raw := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	safe := template.HTMLEscaper(raw)
	w.Write([]byte(safe))
}
